description: Exploratory LOU discovery/cross-reference retrieval checks for Safeway Pueblo Clerks (dress requirements / LOU 8). Non-gating until baseline and fixes stabilize.

test_cases.question: Do you have Letter of Understanding 8 about dress requirements?
What does Letter of Understanding 8 say employees should wear for dress requirements?
expected_citations: Letter of Understanding 8: Dress Requirements letter pursuant to Article 52 of this ..., Part 2
expected_keywords: Open toe or open heel shoes are not permitted

test_cases.question: What are the dress requirements in the letter pursuant to Article 52?
Article 52 Section 158 says dress requirements are in a Letter of Understanding. Which letter is that?
whats the dress code
expected_citations: Letter of Understanding 8: Dress Requirements letter pursuant to Article 52 of this ..., Part 2

test_cases.question: what color shirt and pants are required for the dress requirements
expected_citations: Letter of Understanding 8: Dress Requirements letter pursuant to Article 52 of this ..., Part 2
